message:
feat(tools): add HashlineEditTool for line-addressed file editing

Implements a new HashlineEditTool that enables precise file editing
using content-hash-based line addressing. The tool generates short
hash prefixes for each line, allowing edits to target specific lines
by their content hash rather than fragile line numbers. This approach
is resilient to concurrent modifications and avoids off-by-one errors.

Key capabilities:
- hashline_view: Display file contents with per-line hash prefixes
- hashline_edit: Apply surgical edits using hash-addressed old/new pairs
- Automatic hash collision detection and resolution
- Support for multi-line replacements and insertions
- Integrated validation that edits don't corrupt file structure

Also registers hashline_edit in BUILTIN_TOOL_NAMES and adds
create_hashline_edit_tool() factory in sdk.rs. Updates cli.rs
help text to list the new tool. Adds 'blake3' dependency.

+1,062 lines in tools.rs, +21 in sdk.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
